q: What does 'omluvit se' mean in English?
e: Omluvit se means to express regret and ask for forgiveness for having done something wrong.
Oběť is a person who is harmed, killed, or wronged by another person or event.
Svědek (witness) is someone who sees and can testify about an event. Example: 'Svědek nebyl nikdy před soudem.' (The witness was never in court before.)
Soudce (judge) is a person who presides over a court and makes legal decisions. Example: 'Soudce nikdy neviděl takový zločin.' (The judge had never seen such a crime.)
Podezřelý (suspect) is a person suspected of committing a crime. Example: 'Podezřelý nikdy předtím neviděl svědka.' (The suspect had never seen the witness before.)
Nevinný (innocent) means not guilty of a crime or wrongdoing. Example: 'Podezřelý je nevinný.' (The suspect is innocent.)

s: cs-b04-205 means "to commit suicide" in czech
q: What does 'spáchat sebevraždu' mean in Czech?
e: Spáchat sebevraždu literally means 'to commit suicide' (ending one's own life). Example: 'Oběť plánovala spáchat sebevraždu.' (The victim was planning to commit suicide.)
Popřít (to deny) means to refuse to admit or acknowledge something. Example: 'Podezřelý popřel spáchání trestného činu.' (The suspect denied committing the crime.)

q: What does 'přiznat si' mean in Czech?
e: Přiznat si (to admit) means to acknowledge or confess something, usually something wrongdoing. Example: 'Obžalovaný přiznal, že vykradl dům oběti.' (The accused admitted that he robbed the victim's house.)
Případ (case) refers to a particular matter or legal case being investigated. Example: 'Soudce rozhodl, že v tomto případě je vinen.' (The judge decided that in this case he is guilty.)
Dokázat (to prove) means to show evidence that something is true. Example: 'On dokázal, že je nevinný.' (He proved that he is innocent.)
Cukrovka (diabetes) is a medical condition affecting blood sugar levels. Example: 'Pokud budete jíst příliš mnoho sladkostí, dostanete cukrovku.' (If you eat too many sweets, you will get diabetes.)
Sedět (to sit) is the action of being seated. Example: 'Pokud budete dlouho sedět, budou vás bolet záda.' (If you sit for a long time, your back will hurt.)
Zdravý (healthy) means in good health and well-being. Example: 'Pokud budu jíst více zeleniny, budu zdravý.' (If I eat more vegetables, I will be healthy.)
Možný (possible) means that something can happen or be done. Example: 'Pokud je to možné, půjdu domů.' (If it is possible, I will go home.)
Svěží (fresh) describes something new, cool, or invigorating. Example: 'Pokud budete dělat jógu každý den, budete vypadat svěží.' (If you do yoga every day, you will look fresh.)

s: cs-b04-215 means "in good shape" in czech
q: What does 'v dobré kondici' mean in Czech?
e: V dobré kondici (in good shape) refers to being physically fit and well-conditioned. Example: 'Pokud budete chodit často do posilovny, budete v dobré kondici.' (If you go to the gym often, you will be in good shape.)
Nezbytné (necessary) means absolutely needed or required. Example: 'Pokud je to nutné, opravím auto sám.' (If it is necessary, I will repair the car myself.)

q: What does 'bolest ramene' mean in Czech?
e: Bolest ramene (shoulder pain) is discomfort or ache in the shoulder area. Example: 'Pokud by nepracovala příliš dlouho, nebolelo by jí teď rameno.' (If she hadn't worked so long, her shoulder wouldn't hurt now.)

s: cs-b04-218 means "to brush one's teeth" in czech
q: What does 'čistit si zuby' mean in Czech?

q: What does 'osprchovat se' mean in Czech?
e: Osprchovat se (to shower) means to wash oneself under a shower. Example: 'Kdybych si nedal včera v noci sprchu, nespal bych dobře.' (If I hadn't showered last night, I wouldn't have slept well.)

q: What does 'prášky proti bolesti' mean in Czech?
e: Prášky proti bolesti (pain killer) are medications that relieve pain. Example: 'Kdybych užívala prášky proti bolesti, necítila bych včera takové bolesti.' (If I had taken painkillers, I wouldn't have felt such pain yesterday.)

Zotavit (to recover) means to regain health or strength after illness or injury. Example: 'Kdybych si vzal ten lék včera, už bych se zotavil.' (If I had taken that medicine yesterday, I would have recovered by now.)

Operace (operation) is a surgical procedure performed by doctors. Example: 'Kdybych nepodstoupil operaci, nebyl bych se zotavil z bolesti.' (If I hadn't had the operation, I wouldn't have recovered from the pain.)
Léčba (treatment) refers to medical care or therapy for an illness. Example: 'Kdybych měl více peněz, tak bych zahájil léčbu.' (If I had more money, I would start treatment.)
Narozeniny (Birthday) is the anniversary of the day someone was born. Example: 'Přeji ti všechno nejlepší k narozeninám.' (I wish you all the best on your birthday.)

Slavit (to celebrate) means to mark a special occasion with joy and festivities. Example: 'Dnes večer budeme slavit mé narozeniny u mě v bytě.' (Tonight we will celebrate my birthday at my apartment.)
Říjen (October) is the tenth month of the year. Example: 'Moje narozeniny jsou 25.října 1972.' (My birthday is October 25, 1972.)
Výročí (anniversary) is the yearly recurrence of a significant date or event. Example: 'Přejeme Vám šťastné výročí.' (We wish you a happy anniversary.)

q: What does 'oslava nového bytu' mean in Czech?
e: Oslava nového bytu (Housewarming) is a celebration held when someone moves into a new home. Example: 'V létě jsme plánovali oslavu nového bytu.' (In summer we were planning a housewarming party.)
Stipendium (scholarship) is financial aid given to students for education. Example: 'On doufá, že získá japonské stipendium.' (He hopes to get a Japanese scholarship.)
Selhat (to fail) means to be unsuccessful or not achieve a goal. Example: 'Já doufám, že neselžu u zkoušky.' (I hope I won't fail the exam.)
Zlepšit (to improve) means to make something better or enhance it. Example: 'Já doufám, že brzy zlepším své komunikační schopnosti.' (I hope to improve my communication skills soon.)

q: What does 'přát si' mean in Czech?
e: Přát si (to wish) means to have a strong desire for something. It is commonly used to express hopes and dreams.
Povýšení (promotion) is advancement to a higher position or rank in a job. Example: 'Kéž bych mohl být brzy povýšen, abych byl manažer.' (I wish I could be promoted soon to become a manager.)

q: What does 'stát se' mean in Czech?
e: Stát se (to become) means to change into a different state or condition. Example: 'Oni by si přáli stát se brzy rodiči.' (They would wish to become parents soon.)

Svatba (wedding) is a ceremony in which two people are joined in marriage. Example: 'Já doufám, že budeš moci přijít na mou svatbu v lednu.' (I hope you can come to my wedding in January.)

Oslava (celebration) is a joyful event or gathering to commemorate something special. Example: 'On doufá, že si hosté užijí svatební oslavu.' (He hopes the guests will enjoy the wedding celebration.)

e: Vrátit se (to come back) means to return to a place or person. Example: 'Přál bych si, aby se ke mně vrátila.' (I wish she would come back to me.)

q: What does 'pamatovat si' mean in Czech?
e: Pamatovat si (to remember) means to keep something in memory or recall it. Example: 'Přál bych si, aby si na ni pamatoval.' (I wish he would remember her.)
Bohatý (rich) means having a lot of money or possessions. Example: 'Kdybych byl bohatý, koupil bych velký dům.' (If I were rich, I would buy a big house.)
Rozzlobený (angry) means feeling or expressing anger. Example: 'Kdyby byla touto ženou, byla by velmi rozzlobená.' (If she were this woman, she would be very angry.)
Vyhrát (to win) means to be victorious or gain success in a competition. Example: 'Kdyby byl silný, vyhrál by.' (If he were strong, he would win.)
Odpustit (to forgive) means to stop feeling angry at someone for a wrongdoing. Example: 'Kdybych byl tebou, neodpustil bych mu to.' (If I were you, I wouldn't forgive him.)
Opice (monkey) is a primate animal known for intelligence and agility. Example: 'Kdybych byl opice, jedl bych jen banány.' (If I were a monkey, I would eat only bananas.)
Vila (villa) is a large, luxurious country house or residence. Example: 'Přál bych si, abych měl vilu.' (I wish I had a villa.)

Španělština (Spanish) is the language spoken in Spain and many countries in Central and South America. Example: 'Přál bych si, abych uměl mluvit španělsky, abych s ním mohl mluvit.' (I wish I could speak Spanish so I could talk with him.)
